name: Hebrew RTL Fix for Claude.ai
description: Forces RTL on Hebrew lines inside Claude.ai chat bubbles

rtl_settings.__comment: Edit these knobs, then reload the extension in chrome://extensions. Deleting a key falls back to the same default in content.js.
rtl_settings.paragraph_selector: p, li, blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, td, th
rtl_settings.skip_selector: nav, aside, header, pre, code, [contenteditable="true"], textarea
